title: Fix Payment Modal and Alert Styling in Dark Mode
story: As a DataTools Pro user using dark mode, I want the payment modal text and alert notification styling to display correctly, so that I can read billing information and notifications regardless of my theme preference.
description:
## Context

Two styling issues exist in the payment and notification areas when the application is in dark mode.

## Issues

### Payment Modal
When clicking to pay to add more users, the popup modal renders white text on a light background in dark mode, making the content unreadable.

### Alert Icon Notifications
The alert icon in the upper right has the inverse problem: text appears dark when it should be light in dark mode. Additionally, the date within the notification appears as a clickable item when it should be plain text.

## Fix
Adjust CSS for both the payment modal and alert notification components to respect the dark mode theme. Remove the clickable styling from the notification date.
acceptance_criteria: Payment modal text is readable in dark mode (not white-on-white)
Alert notification text displays as light text on dark background in dark mode
Notification date is not styled as a clickable element
Both components render correctly in light mode as well
ux_changes: Fixed CSS for the payment modal and alert notification components to properly handle dark mode theming. Payment modal text color adjusted, alert notification text color corrected, and clickable styling removed from notification dates.
comment_summary: Developer fixed the styling issues and pushed to staging for review.
